mapper.select:
select id,name,birthday,gender,health_status healthStatus, emergency_contact emergencyContact,relation,contact_number contactNumber from t_elder
or name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
or contact_number like concat('%',#{contactNumber},'%')
select id,name,birthday,gender,health_status healthStatus, emergency_contact emergencyContact,relation,contact_number contactNumber from t_elder where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update t_elder set name = #{name}, birthday = #{birthday}, gender = #{gender}, health_status = #{healthStatus}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, relation = #{relation}, contact_number = #{contactNumber}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
